#  Can we set the cost basis for new CCOs 'Latest Cost' or 'Latest Price' in the Change Events tool? 
##  Answer 
Yes. To provide Procore users with a more precise method for tracking financial changes in the Change Events tool, project teams can configure the tool to create new commitment change orders using the _Latest Cost_ or _Latest Price_ value. To configure this setting in the Change Events tool, your team must also enable the Change Orders tool. See [Enable the Change Orders Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/enable-the-change-orders-tool)
For each project, authorized users can configure one (1) of these options to maintain accurate cost records, gain visibility into your profit margins on change orders, effectively manage the project's budget, and ensure reliable financial reporting. This helps to ensure that your financial records are accurate. For instructions, see [Configure Settings: Change Events](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-change-events).
